sizing_rule.note: Position size in dollars converges to lower bound (worst-case loss) as optimal f approaches 1.0 when upper bound of distribution increases while lower bound remains constant. This is a theoretical relationship demonstrating how optimal f scales with distribution asymmetry.

source_rule_text: As the upper bound of a distribution increases while keeping the lower bound constant, optimal f approaches 1 and position sizing in dollars approaches the lower bound (worst-case expected loss).
